overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female character wading through a flooded canyon with tall rock walls, then transitioning onto dry rocky terrain with tropical vegetation. The environment features clear skies, bright sunlight, and a mix of water features and natural rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded narrow canyon between tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through knee-deep water in a narrow canyon, moving between tall rock walls

entered.detail: vertical rock face with rough texture forming the left boundary of the canyon
vertical rock face with rough texture forming the right boundary of the canyon
calm reflective water filling the canyon floor, reaching character's knees
tall evergreen trees visible above the rock walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow flooded canyon with tall rock walls on both sides. The water is calm and reflective, reaching knee height, while pine trees are visible above the canyon rim against a bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded area with scattered rock formations

events.description: character turns left to follow the water channel along the rock wall

agents.ego_description: turning left to follow the canyon wall, continuing to wade through the water

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds visible beyond the rock wall
large rocky outcrops and boulders in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left along the canyon wall, entering a more open area with full sky visibility. The right rock wall falls behind while palm trees and distant rock formations come into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline transitioning from water to dry land

events.description: character exits the water onto dry rocky ground

agents.ego_description: walking forward and transitioning from wading in water to walking on dry rocky shore

entered.detail: rocky shoreline path with pebbles and stones
reddish-brown rocky ground with sparse grass

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the shoreline and exits the water onto a rocky pebble path. The water surface gives way to dry reddish terrain as the character leaves the flooded canyon behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry rocky terrain with tropical vegetation and large boulders

events.description: entering area with dense banana trees and large tropical leaves

agents.ego_description: walking through dry terrain surrounded by large rock formations and tropical vegetation

entered.detail: large tropical plants with broad green leaves
massive rock structures and boulders surrounding the area
reddish dirt trail winding through the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dry rocky area surrounded by massive boulders and tropical vegetation including banana trees and palms. The ground is now dry reddish dirt as the character moves deeper into the rock garden area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character wades through a narrow flooded canyon that gradually opens into a dry, tropical rock garden. It begins with the character walking through calm, knee-high reflective water flanked by towering rock walls and pine trees visible along the rim. As the character turns left, the canyon walls recede to reveal an expansive sky and the first glimpses of distant palm trees and rock formations. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the shoreline, transitioning from the water onto a dry, reddish pebble path. Finally, the environment opens completely into a rugged landscape of massive boulders and lush tropical vegetation, including banana trees, as the character moves deeper into the arid terrain.
